fullArticle:
Cale Makar has played 7 seasons for the Avalanche. He has 136 goals, 371 assists and a plus-minus of +168 in 470 games. He has won 2 Norris Trophies, the Calder Trophy, 1 Conn Smythe Trophy and 1 Stanley Cup.
